summary: V38.0 Same Plane Architecture testing complete. 21/21 tests passed. The mixer is now ONE cohesive organism with content-area, tool-panel, and mixer-nav as inline flex siblings. Zero position:fixed elements from mixer. All navigation, FX, text overlays, recording, audio, layer, export, AI, and fullscreen features working correctly.

issues: Minor: After RESET, filter values show tiny residual values (blur: 0.12px, brightness: 1.02) instead of exact zeros - likely animation timing, not a blocker

context_for_next_testing_agent: V38.0 Same Plane Architecture fully verified. The sovereign-organism is a flex column with 3 siblings: content-area (flex:1), tool-panel (when open), mixer-nav (44px). Zero position:fixed from mixer. Content-area shrinks when panel opens (flex behavior). All 8 tool tabs working. Mixer hidden on /sovereign-hub, /auth, /landing, /intro.

tests_executed.details: div[data-testid='sovereign-organism'] exists with display:flex, flexDirection:column
div[data-testid='content-area'] exists as first child

tests_executed.test: 3. ARCHITECTURE: mixer-nav exists and NOT position:fixed
tests_executed.details: mixer-nav position:static, height:44px
Only 1 fixed element found (nav-controls from page content, not mixer)
mix, record, audio, text, overlay, effects, ai, export

From /nourishment, navigated to /discover

Filter changed to brightness(1.64)

All 3 recording buttons present and clickable
Slider exists and value changes on drag

All text overlays cleared
All 3 layer buttons present
All 5 ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1, 4:3, 4:5) present, selection changes on click

tests_executed.test: 21. AI: 6 tool buttons and prompt textarea exist
tests_executed.details: All 6 AI buttons and prompt input found
Mixer-nav hidden, exit strip (8px) visible at bottom

tests_executed.test: 23. FULLSCREEN: Exit strip restores nav bar
tests_executed.details: Nav bar restored after clicking exit strip
Mixer nav NOT present on /sovereign-hub

tests_executed.test: 25. SAME PLANE: Content-area shrinks when panel opens
tests_executed.details: Content-area shrinks by 110px when panel opens (flex behavior confirmed)
Organism has 3 children: content-area, tool-panel, mixer-nav (all siblings, no portals)
